summary: Wastewater process optimization that also delivers measured carbon removal.
editor_note: This is climate tech with an operator's wedge: make sewage plants cheaper before selling carbon removal. CREW uses calcium carbonate dosing, closed-system measurement, and projects at nearly 10 facilities; one utility may defer a $350M upgrade. Unlike credits-first carbon removal, the buyer also gets better pH, settleability, and chemical spend. That dual value is why it feels less fragile than most climate markets.
